mapper.select: SELECT fid, fbillno, fdocumentstatus, fcreatorid, fcreatedate, fshr, fdate_sh, fdate, f_xsy, f_khjc, f_kh, f_khmc, f_ckgj, f_khlx, f_email, f_mob, f_tel, f_fax, f_qyd, f_fktj FROM purchase_quotation WHERE fbillno = #{billNo}

SELECT pq.fid, pq.fbillno, pq.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, pq.fcreatedate, su.user_name as fshr, pq.fdate_sh, pq.fdate, se.fname as f_xsy, pq.f_khjc, bc.fnumber as f_kh, pq.f_khmc, pq.f_ckgj, pq. f_khlx, pq.f_email, pq.f_mob, pq.f_tel, pq.f_fax, pq.f_qyd, pq.f_fktj FROM purchase_quotation pq
LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pq.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sy on pq.fshr=sy.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pq.f_xsy=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on pq.f_kh=bc.fcustid WHERE pq.id = #{id}

SELECT pq.fid, pq.fbillno, pq.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, pq.fcreatedate, su.user_name as fshr, pq.fdate_sh, pq.fdate, se.fname as f_xsy, pq.f_khjc, bc.fnumber as f_kh, pq.f_khmc, pq.f_ckgj, pq. f_khlx, pq.f_email, pq.f_mob, pq.f_tel, pq.f_fax, pq.f_qyd, pq.f_fktj FROM purchase_quotation pq
LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pq.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sy on pq.fshr=sy.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pq.f_xsy=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on pq.f_kh=bc.fcustid WHERE pq.fbillno = #{billNo} AND pq.fid != #{excludeFid}

SELECT pq.fid, pq.fbillno, pq.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, pq.fcreatedate, su.user_name as fshr, pq.fdate_sh, pq.fdate, se.fname as f_xsy, pq.f_khjc, bc.fnumber as f_kh, pq.f_khmc, pq.f_ckgj, pq. f_khlx, pq.f_email, pq.f_mob, pq.f_tel, pq.f_fax, pq.f_qyd, pq.f_fktj FROM purchase_quotation pq
LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pq.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sy on pq.fshr=sy.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pq.f_xsy=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on pq.f_kh=bc.fcustid
AND fbillno LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fbillno}, '%')
AND fdocumentstatus = #{purchaseQuotation.fdocumentstatus}
AND f_xsy = #{purchaseQuotation.fxSy}
AND f_khjc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fKhjc}, '%')
ORDER BY fcreatedate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_quotation ( fid, fbillno, fdocumentstatus, fcreatorid, fcreatedate, fshr, fdate_sh, fdate, f_xsy, f_khjc, f_kh, f_khmc, f_ckgj, f_khlx, f_email, f_mob, f_tel, f_fax, f_qyd, f_fktj ) VALUES ( #{purchaseQuotation.fid}, #{purchaseQuotation.fbillno}, #{purchaseQuotation.fdocumentstatus}, #{purchaseQuotation.fcreatorid}, #{purchaseQuotation.fcreatedate}, #{purchaseQuotation.fshr}, #{purchaseQuotation.fdateSh}, #{purchaseQuotation.fdate}, #{purchaseQuotation.fxSy}, #{purchaseQuotation.fKhjc}, #{purchaseQuotation.fKh}, #{purchaseQuotation.fKhmc}, #{purchaseQuotation.fCkgj}, #{purchaseQuotation.fKhlx}, #{purchaseQuotation.fEmail}, #{purchaseQuotation.fMob}, #{purchaseQuotation.fTel}, #{purchaseQuotation.fFax}, #{purchaseQuotation.fQyd}, #{purchaseQuotation.fFktj} )
mapper.select:
SELECT pq.fid, pq.fbillno, pq.fdocumentstatus, su.user_name as fcreatorid, pq.fcreatedate, su.user_name as fshr, pq.fdate_sh, pq.fdate, se.fname as f_xsy, pq.f_khjc, bc.fnumber as f_kh, pq.f_khmc, pq.f_ckgj, pq.f_khlx, pq.f_email, pq.f_mob, pq.f_tel, pq.f_fax, pq.f_qyd, pq.f_fktj FROM purchase_quotation pq LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pq.fcreatorid=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sy on pq.fshr=sy.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee se on pq.f_xsy=se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc on pq.f_kh=bc.fcustid
AND pq.fbillno LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fbillno}, '%')
AND pq.fdocumentstatus = #{purchaseQuotation.fdocumentstatus}
AND pq.f_xsy = #{purchaseQuotation.fxSy}
AND pq.f_khjc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fKhjc}, '%')
AND pq.f_ckgj LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fCkgj}, '%')
AND pq.f_khlx LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseQuotation.fKhlx}, '%')
ORDER BY pq.fcreatedate DESC
